subcodes.first_line: From every side the smoke of hatred and oppression hath ascended. Upon the earth there hath come to pass that which, from the beginning of the world until this time, hath never been witnessed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از هر جهت دخان کینه ظلم مرتفع در ارض یا واقع شد آنچه که از اول دنیا الی حین
